creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text: Poudriere is, as far as I know, the sanctioned way to build and test ports.  You get a clean build environment for every build, thus avoiding environment or dependency pollution from the host system.  It is also the way FreeBSD packages are built.  It is quite possible that this is related to your build environment rather than the rrdtool port, but I have to look in detail, something I haven't had time to do just yet.
